title: Kaios MC [Fabric]
description: Version 1.21 | A perfect vanilla+ modpack | Vanilla is good, but this one is better!
body:
![kaisomcbanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6e65145d943bd0ffb091888c4d0b44177480ba1.png)
![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1222663842715140238?label=Discord&color=393939&labelColor=4a94fb&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)
![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf3770ca337c2493bf9f54f26ee68acd99b6c1fb.png)


- **Stunning Visuals:** Enhanced with Complementary Reimagined shaders.
- **Expanded Endgame:** Features like Better End for a richer experience.
- **Creative Crafting:** More Fletching Tables, Barrel Variants, and Cartography Tables.
- **Smooth Gameplay:** Optimized with ModernFix and other performance tweaks.
- **Diverse Adventures:** Explore deeper with Deeper Darker mod.
